label: Ideo preset
description: Defines a preconfigured ideology option shown during new colony setup.

categoryDef.label: Category def
categoryDef.description: IdeoPresetCategoryDef that groups this preset on the ideology selection screen.

memes.label: Memes
memes.description: MemeDefs that make up this preset ideology. Each entry is a meme defName and may carry a MayRequire attribute for expansion-gated memes.

iconPath.label: Icon path
iconPath.description: Texture path for the icon shown on the preset. Not translated.

classicPlus.label: Classic plus
classicPlus.description: When true, this preset is the classic-like entry shown when Ideology is not enabled.

basic-ideo-preset.label: Basic ideo preset
basic-ideo-preset.description: Minimal ideology preset with a defName, label, description, category, and meme list.
